templates.text: A box holds {a} pencils. You buy {b} boxes. How many pencils in total?
You have {a} apples and pick {b} more. How many apples now?
There are {a} birds on a wire. {b} fly away. How many remain?
Share {a} stickers equally among {b} friends. How many each?
A shelf has {b} rows of {a} books. How many books in all?
A train has {a} seats. {b} are empty. How many are taken?
Tickets cost {a} each. You buy {b}. What is the total cost?
Pour {a} liters of juice into {b} equal cups. Liters per cup?
A bakery makes {a} loaves a day. How many in {b} days?
Split {a} marbles into bags of {b}. How many full bags?
A theater seats {a}. After {b} leave, how many stay?
Each crate weighs {a} kg. Find the weight of {b} crates.
